description: Composition Blue round neck T-shirt made of 50% cotton and 50% polyester, has cap sleeves, graphic print on the front, and embroidered brand logo on the left hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water Do not tumble dry Turn inside out and dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on print and embroidery This blue T-shirt from flying machine has a cute bee buzzing away on the front in a great colour combination of grey yellow and red. Created from soft cotton-polyester fabric, this piece of clothing will flatter your silhouette and offer exemplary comfort. Pair it with jeans and canvas shoes for that absolute holiday look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7"", chest 33"" and waist 25"""
